name: Blynk
description: Low-code IoT platform for connecting devices to the cloud and building mobile apps to control and monitor deployments.

seo.title: Blynk — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Blynk: Low-code IoT platform for connecting devices to the cloud and building mobile apps to control and monitor deployments.

when_to_use: Low-code IoT dashboard for hardware makers and prototypers
Building mobile apps to monitor Arduino/ESP32 sensor data
OTA firmware updates for connected devices via Blynk portal
Rapid IoT MVP without writing a custom backend or mobile app
Remote device control with virtual pins via Blynk API

review.verdict: Excellent low-code IoT for prototypes and small commercial fleets, not a true industrial platform.
review.best_for: Makers and startups validating IoT product ideas cheaply
review.not_for: Industrial or safety-critical IoT needing deep customization
